title: デビュー戦の後に・ここからが

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yes! Now I'm a real runner!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your debut, City! It was a
fantastic run!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
The fans are all wondering about your future!
What kind of agenda do you have in mind?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Will you set your eyes on the G1 races? The
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
The glamor of the race would suit you! Plus it's an
important one leading up to the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
If you want to ask more questions, I'll have to
ask you to schedule an interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah—just one last thing! Your fans are eager to see
more of your eye-catching running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after Gold City's successful debut, I
call her over to decide her next goal.
choice_data_list: I'm thinking the Asahi Hai F.S. or Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai F.S. tends to attract runners aiming
for the Classic Triple Crown tour, while the
Hanshin J.F. is for the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Both the Classic Triple Crown and Triple Tiara are
top class series.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
As a real runner... that's the kind of glory I have
to strive for.
choice_data_list: Either way is a great path.
Either way is a great path.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I think... the Hanshin J.F. might suit me best.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It seems like my fans really want to see me wear
the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara consists of the Oka Sho,
Japanese Oaks, and Shuka Sho—three races
famed for their glamorous spectacle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's like that reporter said, everyone's looking for
an eye-catching performance from me, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I should give them what they
want!
choice_data_list: Then we're headed for the Hanshin J.F.!
